2606.18168.title: All Smoke, No Alarm: Oracle Signals in Agent-Authored Test Code
2606.18168.paper_summary: Software practitioners increasingly use AI coding agents that generate test code alongside production code in open source pull requests (PRs). Recent studies report more than 932,000 agent-authored PRs across more than 116,000 repositories, yet whether their test files contain meaningful verification logic remains underexplored. Test files lacking explicit assertions execute code without verifying behavior, so quality gates based on test-file presence overestimate verification strength. The goal of this paper is to help practitioners assess the verification strength of agent-authored patches by characterizing oracle signals and their link to merge outcomes and review effort. We conduct an empirical study of 86,156 test-file patches from 33,596 agent-authored PRs across 2,807 GitHub repositories produced by five coding agents: OpenAI Codex, GitHub Copilot, Devin, Cursor, and Claude Code. A qualitative analysis of 384 stratified patches informs a syntactic taxonomy of eight oracle signal categories. Applied at scale, 80.2% of test patches contain weak or no explicit oracle signals. While raw merge rates are lower for strong-oracle PRs, a regression analysis adjusting for agent, PR size, repository popularity, task type, and language shows strong oracles significantly improve merge likelihood (OR = 1.28, p < 0.001). Our findings suggest that test file counts substantially overestimate verification strength and that practitioners can adopt oracle-aware quality checks to more accurately evaluate agent-authored contributions.
2606.18168.paper_summary_zh: 軟體從業人員越來越多地使用 AI 編碼代理，這些代理在開源拉取請求 (PRs) 中生成測試代碼和生產代碼。最近的研究報告顯示，在超過 116,000 個庫中，有超過 932,000 個代理創建的 PRs，但它們的測試文件是否包含有意義的驗證邏輯仍然未被充分探討。缺乏明確斷言的測試文件執行代碼而不驗證行為，因此基於測試文件存在的質量門檻會高估驗證強度。本文的目標是幫助從業人員通過描述 oracle 信號及其與合併結果和審查工作量的聯繫來評估代理創建的補丁的驗證強度。我們對來自 5 個編碼代理（OpenAI Codex、GitHub Copilot、Devin、Cursor 和 Claude Code）在 2,807 個 GitHub 倉庫中生成的 33,596 個代理創建的 PRs 的 86,156 個測試文件補丁進行了實證研究。對 384 個分層補丁的定性分析提供了八個 oracle 信號類別的句法分類。大規模應用時，80.2% 的測試補丁包含弱或沒有明確的 oracle 信號。儘管強 oracle PR 的原始合併率較低，但調整代理、PR 大小、庫受歡迎程度、任務類型和語言的回歸分析顯示，強 oracle 顯著提高了合併可能性 (OR = 1.28, p < 0.001)。我們的研究結果表明，測試文件數量大大高估了驗證強度，從業人員可以採用以 oracle 為中心的質量檢查來更準確地評估代理創建的貢獻。
2606.18168.author: Dipayan Banik et.al.
2606.18168.authors: Dipayan Banik, Kowshik Chowdhury, Shazibul Islam Shamim
